Petitioner Through Mr. Alok Kumar Mr. M Taiyeb Khan for the applicant in CM 2822/01 versus UOI and ORS ..... Respondent Through Mr. Nishakant Pandey for UOl. ' , Mr. V K Shall for the Govt. of NCT of Delhi CORAM: HON'BLE THE CHIEF JUSTICE HON'BLE MR. JUSTICE A.K.SIKRI ORDER 19.08.2003 Grievances are made by some of the Advocates that copy of written submissions filed by the petitioner is not given to them. If that is so, the petitioner as well as the respondent sha exchange their written synopsis, to avoid any kind of difficulty at the time of final hearing. List on 18th September, 2003, at the end of After Notice Misc. Matters. CHIEF JUSTICE A.K.SIKRI, J AUGUST 19,2003 PC. -- 6 of 8 -- \ J THE GAZETIE OF INDIA:EXTRAORDINARY [PART II SEC.3(ii») 13.
